text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after a training session, I'm tidying up
the track before our time's up.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
choice_data_list:
You know it's about time for us to clean up,
right?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I'll be done in one more lap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But a lap on this track is a relatively long
distance...
choice_data_list: You think you'll make it in time?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Don't worry. I always do this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Disregarding my reply, Admire Vega breaks into a
run. In that case...
choice_data_list: I'll tidy up a bit of her equipment as well!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I continue to clean up. She comes back
later, finishing her lap well within our allotted
time.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You can go now. I'll take care of the agility
ladder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must have a good reason. I watch as she runs
off into the distance, then I take my leave.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... The stars... they're so pretty.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (It's so quiet... with no one to bother me.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(This is how it should be... Since I have to keep on
running... for her sake.)
